purpose: Local queue for base-generation lane runtime proof order before EC2 execution resumes.

local_package_smoke_matrix.reuse_rule: Do not rerun the repaired local package smoke matrix by default. Reuse this evidence unless a workflow, prompt request, package manifest, model/input asset, or QA threshold changes.
local_package_smoke_matrix.claim_boundary: Local package smoke completion only; not final quality certification, exact character/reference identity proof, full-body proof, gold body-mask proof, body/hand/contact geometry authority, target-runtime EC2 proof, or Wave71+ activation.

lanes.promotion_rule: The first runtime-smoke final review is complete with notes. Do not rerun solely to re-prove the path or generalize the 86/100 portrait sample to final hyperreal portfolio quality.

Do not promote to final RealVisXL certification from the close-up or two-character local samples. The corrected preferred two-character seed remains a local pass with notes, while both adjacent seed-only robustness samples changed the interaction into mutual hand clasps. A materially different composition-control or mask-routed route and scope-matched target-runtime proof remain separate requirements.

Baseline Canny v4 bounded portrait target-runtime proof and final lane certification are complete with notes. Do not generalize this certificate to changed local variants, hands, full body, contact, masks, or broader scenes without new lane-matched target-runtime output and QA.

The exact no-mouth v4 micro facial-detail workflow has one bounded target-runtime smoke certificate with notes. Do not generalize it to full-lane robustness, material detail improvement, trusted-mask authority, body/hand/contact scope, or changed variants without new scope-matched proof.

Bounded portrait target-runtime depth proof and final lane certification are complete. Do not generalize this certification to hands, full-body anatomy, contact, or broader scenes without new lane-matched runtime output and QA.

Bounded portrait target-runtime Lineart proof and final lane certification are complete. Do not generalize to exact silhouette/identity preservation, hands, full-body anatomy, contact, or broader scenes without new lane-matched runtime output and QA.

Do not promote to final OpenPose certification from local multisample alone. Target-runtime object_info/path/hash/input proof, bounded target-runtime generation, pullback, technical QA, and strict final hand-anatomy QA remain separate if selected.

Do not promote to target-runtime proven or final normal certification from local multisample evidence alone. Target-runtime object_info/path/hash/input proof, bounded target-runtime generation, pullback, technical QA, strict whole-image visual QA, and final certification review remain separate if this lane is selected for promotion.

Do not promote to final upscale/polish certification from this single local sample alone. Target-runtime object_info/path/hash proof, bounded target-runtime generation, pullback, technical QA, strict whole-image visual QA, and final certification review remain separate if this lane is selected for promotion.
Do not execute or promote until the exact licensed model source and SHA256 are recorded, the installed file hash matches, object_info passes, and output technical and visual QA pass.

known_limits: Does not refresh AWS browser/SSO auth.
Does not start EC2 or contact ComfyUI.
Does not prove target-runtime behavior for the current Canny v6 microtexture/collar prompt candidate.
Does not prove target-runtime behavior for the current inpaint no-mouth v4 candidate.
Does not replace deeper multi-sample or final portfolio image-quality certification.

The RealESRGAN upscale/polish lane has local runtime generation smoke and visual QA evidence for one source image only; target-runtime proof, broader robustness, and final certification remain separate.
next_action: Continue local-first on the next concrete non-mask orchestration/runtime task. Reuse completed local queue evidence, including RealESRGAN upscale/polish local runtime and visual QA, unless workflow/request/input/model/artifact integrity changed or final certification is intentionally selected. Do not start EC2, rerun Wave65, promote masks, or activate Wave71+.
